tools.name: gas_register_tags
tools.description: Register gameplay tags in DefaultGameplayTags.ini. Tags become immediately available without editor restart. MUST be called FIRST before any other GAS tool that references tags. Tags use dot-separated hierarchy: 'Ability.Melee.Slash', 'Cooldown.Ability.Fireball', 'GameplayCue.Character.Fire'.

tags.description: Array of tag definitions to register

comment.description: Description of what this tag is used for

tools.name: gas_create_attribute_set
tools.description: Generate a C++ UAttributeSet subclass with FGameplayAttributeData properties, ATTRIBUTE_ACCESSORS macros, and replication boilerplate. Creates .h and .cpp files in the Source directory. A compile (trigger_compile) is REQUIRED after this tool before the AttributeSet can be used by other GAS tools. IMPORTANT: Never use Blueprint AttributeSets — they lack the macro expansion needed for stable FGameplayAttribute pin serialization.

class_name.description: Name for the AttributeSet class (e.g., 'UHealthAttributeSet' or 'HealthAttributeSet')

attributes.description: Array of gameplay attributes to include

replicated.description: Whether this attribute replicates to clients (default: true)

tools.name: gas_setup_asc
tools.description: Add a UAbilitySystemComponent to a Blueprint actor via the Simple Construction Script. For player characters, the ASC should live on PlayerState (persists across respawns). For NPCs, attach it directly to the Character. This tool adds the component; the AI must follow up with C++ code for IAbilitySystemInterface implementation and InitAbilityActorInfo calls.

asset_path.description: Content path of the Blueprint to add ASC to (e.g., '/Game/Characters/BP_PlayerCharacter')

tools.name: gas_create_effect
tools.description: Create a UGameplayEffect Blueprint asset. Handles the UE 5.3+ paradigm shift: tag grants are routed through UGameplayEffectComponent subclasses (UTargetTagsGameplayEffectComponent, UAssetTagsGameplayEffectComponent) instead of deprecated flat properties. Supports Instant, HasDuration, and Infinite effects with modifiers, tags, and gameplay cues.

grant_tags.description: Tags to grant to the TARGET (routed via UTargetTagsGameplayEffectComponent)

cue_tags.description: GameplayCue tags to trigger (must start with 'GameplayCue.')

tools.name: gas_create_ability
tools.description: Create a UGameplayAbility Blueprint asset. Sets instancing policy, net execution policy, ability tags, cooldown GE, and cost GE. After creation, use inject_blueprint_nodes_t3d to build the ability graph (Event ActivateAbility -> ability tasks -> CommitAbility -> EndAbility). IMPORTANT: If using latent AbilityTasks (PlayMontageAndWait, WaitTargetData), instancing must be InstancedPerActor — NonInstanced will crash.

instancing_policy.description: How the ability is instanced (default: InstancedPerActor — REQUIRED for latent tasks)

net_execution_policy.description: Network execution mode (default: LocalPredicted for responsive gameplay)

cooldown_effect.description: Content path of the cooldown GE Blueprint (created via gas_create_effect)

cost_effect.description: Content path of the cost GE Blueprint (created via gas_create_effect)
